name: DIGITAL OVERLAY
pitch: A premium fluid-glass refraction and chromatic dispersion overlay. Hovering projects a dynamic magnifying lens dome with edge spectral splitting; clicking triggers an organic water-ripple wave that refracts the background image.

lifecycle.idle: Pristine background image with a soft vignette and subtle atmospheric edge refraction
lifecycle.discovery: Hovering introduces a smooth glass dome that follows the cursor, refracting the pixels below it
lifecycle.buildUp: Approaching the lens boundary reveals organic chromatic dispersion, splitting RGB channels dynamically
lifecycle.peak: Clicking fires a fluid pulse, sending concentric refractive wave ripples across the image plane
lifecycle.recovery: Ripples decay exponentially using a damped sine wave formula, restoring the screen to normal focus
